name: Seventh Knight PC Security
short_description: The Ultimate Security Bundle Engineered For PC Gamers. Replace your outdated Antivirus technology on every PC that you own (up to 3 machines) with the latest patented "Generation 3" whitelisting (with sandbox) technology. No annual renewal!
detailed_description:
End of Life Announcement for PC Security + Gaming Accelerator

Dear Valued Community,

We regret to announce that PC Security + Gaming Accelerator will be discontinued on the Steam Store, effective immediately. After careful consideration, the Seventh Knight Team has made the difficult decision to end support for this product.

Reasons for Discontinuation

This decision stems from the following factors:

  • End of Support for Windows 10: With Microsoft’s official end of support for Windows 10, we are unable to maintain compatibility for PC Security + Gaming Accelerator on this operating system.

  • Shifting Development Priorities: Due to resource constraints and evolving priorities, we can no longer provide ongoing updates, bug fixes, or technical support for PC Security + Gaming Accelerator.

What This Means for Users

  • No Further Updates: PC Security + Gaming Accelerator will no longer receive updates or technical support.

  • Continued Use: Existing users can continue using the product, but please be aware that compatibility issues may arise on unsupported systems.

  • Steam Store Sunset: The product will be removed from the Steam Store.

We are immensely grateful for the incredible support, feedback, and passion you’ve shown for PC Security + Gaming Accelerator. Your dedication has made this journey unforgettable, and we deeply appreciate your role in our community.

Support Information

For any questions or concerns, please contact our support team at support@seventhknight.com. Support will be available until November 30, 2025.

Thank you for being part of the PC Security + Gaming Accelerator journey. While this chapter closes, we hope you’ll continue to enjoy the product and join us in future endeavors.

Sincerely, The Seventh Knight Team


About the Software

Seventh Knight PC Security Quick Facts:

Replace your outdated Antivirus technology on every PC that you own (up to 3 machines) with the latest patented technology. This product is based on a patented "Generation 3" whitelisting (with sandbox) technology to protect against advanced threats that anti-virus cannot. Gaming Accelerator 2 utility that boots Windows into a special Gaming Mode is included. Most users will experience smoother gameplay and a slight FPS increase.


  • Protect your PC from zero-day “ransomware” attacks like WannaCry 2.0 and CryptoLocker.
  • Seventh Knight protection does not slow down your PC by constantly scanning files or downloading updates.
  • Built on a patented “whitelisting” engine.
  • Set a password to help prevent kids from infecting the PC while playing Games or browsing.
  • No more anti-virus software renewals! This version will not expire.

Please Note:

This product WILL NOT clean an already infected computer.
Designed to help keep a clean computer infection free.

Gaming Accelerator 2 Quick Facts:


  • Simple on/off operation with “Maximum Boost” preset.
  • Completely different from competitors such as system optimizers.
  • Get more performance from your existing hardware.
  • No spyware, excess programs, or pop-up ads.
  • Remembers custom settings for programs in Gaming Mode.
  • Typical Performance Boost 10%-40% (Results vary by machine)
  • This version will not expire. No annual renewal required!
